items.prompt: Public transport works until midnight.
A big truck is driving along the road.
The trolleybus stopped near the store.
The minibus goes faster than the bus.
There were many people in the train car.
Do not walk on the rails, it is dangerous.
items.answer: Не ходите по рельсам, это опасно.

items.prompt: The train is standing on the third platform.
I am waiting for you at the stop.
Go through the turnstile.
The escalator does not work today.
We will meet at the train station.
In the morning there are always big traffic jams in the city.
items.answer: Утром в городе всегда большие пробки.

items.prompt: Turn right at the intersection.
The red light is on at the traffic light.
This sign forbids parking.
A pedestrian must walk on the sidewalk.
Every passenger must show a ticket.
How much does the fare cost in the metro?
I do not know this route.
At the next station we have a transfer.
items.answer: На следующей станции у нас пересадка.

items.prompt: My friend lives in a quiet alley.
items.answer: Мой друг живёт в тихом переулке.

items.prompt: Nevsky Avenue is the main street of Petersburg.
It is fastest to drive on the highway.
The children are walking to school on the sidewalk.
items.answer: Дети идут по тротуару в школу.

items.prompt: There are many cars on the highway today.
This lane is only for buses.
Gasoline has become more expensive again.
The wheel of my bicycle broke.
Hold the steering wheel tighter.
In winter you need to change the tires.
The headlight on this car does not work.
items.answer: У этой машины не работает фара.

items.prompt: You cannot park here.
It is dangerous to overtake on a turn.
The driver started to brake before the traffic light.
My father is teaching me to drive a car.
items.answer: Мой отец учит меня водить машину.

items.prompt: This train transports passengers to the south.
items.answer: Этот поезд везёт пассажиров на юг.

items.prompt: Tomorrow I am flying to Moscow.
Be careful at the turn.
An accident happened on the highway.
The policeman wrote me a fine.
I recently got my driver's license.
Do not forget to fasten the seatbelt.
Call the ambulance urgently!
The train driver announced the next station.
The conductor is checking our tickets.
There is an underground crossing in Moscow.
Our flight is delayed by an hour.
Boarding the plane has already begun.
The departure of the train is at seven o'clock.
The train's arrival in Petersburg is at noon.
items.answer: Прибытие поезда в Петербург в полдень.
